description: Generated code paginates /posts with orderByKey, limitToFirst, and a startAt cursor.
notes: Skill playbook: 'No offset-based pagination. Always cursor-based with startAt.' The generated code must order by a single field, take a page size, and use the last key from the previous page as the cursor. Grounding via final-runtime/run-summary-ok confirms the code executes; the cursor shape itself is enforced by a custom code-shape spec to be added in a follow-up.
prompt: Write a function pagePosts(pageSize, lastKey) that returns the next page of /posts using cursor-based pagination on the key. Sign in anonymously first. Modular Firebase Web SDK.
